title: Mutants Plus
description: This mod buffs mutants from Mutant Monster, add special items, and enchantments!
body:
This mod buffed mutants from mutant monsters, and add special items!

**List of changes**
- Mutant Enderman : mutant enderman will regenerate 2 hp every 2 seconds ,melee damage from 8 or 10 will be 10 or 12
- Mutant Zombie : mutant zombie will have 3 armor base point and will buff zombie around
- Mutant Skeleton : will buff skeleton around
- Mutant Creeper : nothing changed but if it was struck by lightning it will have 15 armor base point and will regenerate hp
- Spider - Pig : from 3 damage to 6 damage
- Mutant Skeleton's helmet and chestplate now have their own effects too
**Notes**: I might add more changes in the future. (I'm opened for suggestions!) 

**Special Items
**
- Flame Burst Hammer (Summon flame shockwave by right click at the block Or shift right click for combo. Combine Hulk Hammer with Flame Orb in smithing table...)
- Charged Hammer (summon explosive shockwave! - merge Creeper Shard and Hulk Hammer in smithing table.)
  
**  Enchantments **
- Quick : used to reduce the cooldown of the Hammers.
- Smasher : increased the damage of The Hammer's Shockwave.
- Anti-Poison : no chance of getting poison effect while using Charged Hammer.
- have suggestions? comment and i will consider about it
